title: Malare Lyrics Premam
stanzas:
puzhayoram thazhukunnee
thanu neeran kaattum
pulakangal izhaneythoru
 kuzhaloothiya pole

kulirekum kanavil
nee kathiradiya kaalam
manathaaril madhumaasam
thaliraadiya neram

akamarukum mayilinakal
thuyilunarum kaalam
en akathaaril anuraagam
pakarunna yaamam

idarunna ennte idanenjinullil
pranayathin mazhayayi
nee pozhiyunnee naalil
thalarunnorente
thanuthorum ninte
alathallum
pranayathalunarum

malare..azhage..
kulirekum kanavil
nee kathiradiya kaalam
manathaaril madhumaasam
thaliraadiya neram
akamurukum mayilinakal
thuyilunarum kaalam
en akathaaril anuraagam
pakarunna yaamam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Malare?

Malare conveys deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics.

How does Malare fit into the plot of Premam?

The song plays a crucial role in showcasing the romantic moments between the lead characters in Premam.

Who is the singer of Malare?

The song is sung by the legendary K.J. Yesudas, known for his soulful voice.

When was Malare released?

Malare was released on May 29, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Premam, the song Malare encapsulates the essence of young love and the beauty of fleeting moments. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and romance. The song serves as a backdrop to significant emotional scenes, enhancing the connection between the characters. K.J. Yesudas's soulful rendition adds depth to the song, making it a memorable experience for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Malare from the film Premam, where the legendary K.J. Yesudas brings a soulful touch to this romantic melody. The song beautifully captures the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless classic. Dive into the lyrical magic that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Like the color of a raindrop, it feels like a dream that is clear.
Like a river flowing down, it shows the beauty of nature, like a sweet melody.
In the cool dream, you are the light, the time of the month of love is like a gentle breeze.
In the time of the peacock's sleep, my heart feels the love that blooms in the night.
Oh beauty... like a sculpted beauty, oh flower... the fragrance that spreads in my heart.
If you were not to be seen, it would feel like all colors fading away.
If I were to reach out to you, it would feel like all dreams disappearing into beauty.
The rhythms and melodies are like every color coming together.
In my heart, your love pours like rain, on the day when you fall into my arms, your beauty and love will be intertwined.
Oh flower... oh beauty... in the cool dream, you are the light, the time of the month of love is like a gentle breeze.
Oh beauty... like a sculpted beauty, oh flower... the fragrance that spreads in my heart.
